name: Nuvio Search
description: Advanced search capabilities using LLMs to safely index and retrieve your Notion pages.

name: TaskFlow Sync
description: Bidirectional sync between your Notion tasks and external project management tools with beautiful status indicators in your library.

name: Zen Writer
description: A minimalist distraction-free writing environment plugin for your Notion blocks.

name: Analytics Dash
description: Embed privacy-first, beautifully styled analytics directly into your public Notion pages.

description: Track your manga reading progress natively inside Notion tables with automatic cover fetching.

name: Code Snippet Pro

author: CodeCrafters
